reasoning: The leaderboard is highly volatile. In early 2025, xAI's Grok 3 and Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro held the #1 spot, but as of August/September 2025, OpenAI's GPT-5 reportedly topped the leaderboard. With the resolution date on December 31, 2025 (2 months past the cutoff), there's high uncertainty.
